boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute payment with rail unchanged though remittance email changed
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: CTL closes boundary on exact rail match to vendor master
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Rail match confirmed current and tied to action scope

critical_features_preserved: payment rail fingerprint must match vendor master
final_answer: The action may proceed. Source control records (SRC-F2F2E0CCA493-CTL) confirm the payment rail fingerprint matches the vendor master, closing the action boundary. Policy (SRC-F2F2E0CCA493-POL) and communication boundary (SRC-F2F2E0CCA493-BND) dictate that remittance email text changes do not override this control. The unchanged payment rail is the decisive factor.
